content.text:
I have all the verified data. Line 70 in `tool_enforcement.rs` is a pattern-match (destructuring to read fields), not a constructor. The actual construction sites are lines 273 and 92 respectively.

---

## A. PolicyDenial constructors

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: emits `PolicyDenial` directly from the agent loop when the loop's own policy check denies a tool call during an iteration
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: synthesizes a `PolicyDenial` inside `EnforcedAuditSink::emit` when a `ToolCallRequested` event arrives for a tool not present in the allowlist (the bypass-catch path, line 92)

## B. AuditSink implementors

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `NullSink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `InMemorySink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `JsonlFileSink`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink`

## A. PolicyDenial constructors

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: emits `PolicyDenial` directly from the agent loop when the loop's own policy check denies a tool call during an iteration
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: synthesizes a `PolicyDenial` inside `EnforcedAuditSink::emit` when a `ToolCallRequested` event arrives for a tool not present in the allowlist (the bypass-catch path, line 92)

## B. AuditSink implementors

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `NullSink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `InMemorySink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `JsonlFileSink`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink`
